text: Hey Jarvis, what does my schedule look like for Thursday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Thursday, October 31. You have design sync with Sarah at noon, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. Staying active is key. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Got it, Mike. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Calculating some savings estimates. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Refinancing is a great leverage point. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reading scientific papers late tonight. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah attended the parent-teacher conference today. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: I can help with that. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Good focus area. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Need to focus on recovery.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. I've logged your vitals. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Saying goodbye to my old colleagues in Chicago on my last day at MedFuture Systems. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. That sounds critical. It's important to keep in touch with old colleagues; they are a great professional network. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Reviewing our household budget today. We just signed the mortgage papers and closed on our Frisco house. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Budget tracking is updated. Congratulations! Owning your home in Frisco is a major milestone for the family. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Modified the smart-home alert integrations. Spectrometry data for K2-18b is fascinating. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. K2-18b atmospheric profiles are a milestone. I'll fetch companion papers. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: Interesting. That's wonderful. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that lily refused to eat her dinner today. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Toddlers are full of energy. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that anika and I were mapping out the sprint goals. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /sms/send under load. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've noted that. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /sms/send. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, logging my evening reflection. Busy day at Vertex Health. CareConnect prep is moving along. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
